title: Pillowy American Potato Casserole
description: A sweet and pillowy American dish featuring smoky paprika, perfect for a hangover cure, made with dairy-free friendly ingredients. This casserole is a comforting and satisfying meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced potatoes, smoky paprika, salt, and black pepper, and toss to coat.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the non-dairy milk, melted vegan butter, and brown sugar.

In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of potatoes, then pour some of the milk mixture over the potatoes, and repeat this process until all ingredients are used, ending with a layer of potatoes on top.
Drizzle the olive oil over the top layer of potatoes.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 45 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 30 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and the top is golden brown.
